text:
/ci1 1 腕にごっついのついとるヤツ。
あいつの攻撃も厄介やで。

/ci1 1 地面をドーンと叩いて
当たれば吹き飛ぶ衝撃波を
出してくねん。

/ci1 1 回転したり、飛び上がったり
そういう動きしたときは
要注意やで！

/ci1 1 Ah, the one with the super-muscly arms.
Talk about a nasty piece of work.

/ci1 1 It slams into the ground and sends out a
shockwave that'll have you catching some
serious air.

/ci1 1 When it spins around and jumps, that's
when you've REALLY gotta watch out!
